description: Evidence type taxonomy and expected_evidence_type resolution mapping. Supports future separation of EvidenceType (type_key) and EvidenceRequirement (requirement_scope).

evidence_type_keys.name: Certification
evidence_type_keys.description: Third-party certification mark, registration, or credential substantiation.

evidence_type_keys.name: Laboratory Report
evidence_type_keys.description: Laboratory test report or quantitative performance validation document.

evidence_type_keys.name: Clinical Evidence
evidence_type_keys.description: Clinical study or trial substantiation for health or efficacy claims.

evidence_type_keys.name: General Substantiation
evidence_type_keys.description: General substantiation file supporting advertising claims.

evidence_type_keys.name: Test Method
evidence_type_keys.description: Documented test method aligned with on-pack or advertised specifications.
